items.title: Amazon announces partnership with a new coalition to develop the workforce for the AI era
items.summary: Amazon is joining RAISE US as a founding member to help workers prepare for the jobs of tomorrow.

items.title: Amazon announces it will invest $48 billion in India by 2030
items.summary: Since launching in India, Amazon has digitized 12 million small businesses and supported 2.8 million jobs.
